qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.d_interfaz as INTERFACE, t.oi_obra_social as ID, t.c_obra_social as CODE, t.d_obra_social as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM PER06_OBRAS_SOC as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Obras_Sociales.OBRA_SOCIAL\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_obra_social LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_obra_social={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.d_interfaz as INTERFACE, t.oi_obra_social as ID, t.c_obra_social as CODE, t.d_obra_social as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM PER06_OBRAS_SOC as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Obras_Sociales.OBRA_SOCIAL\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_obra_social LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.c_obra_social={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql('SELECT t.d_interfaz as INTERFACE, t.oi_obra_social as ID, t.c_obra_social as CODE, t.d_obra_social as TEXT, SEC.policy FROM PER06_OBRAS_SOC as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Personal.Obras_Sociales.OBRA_SOCIAL\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_obra_social LEFT OUTER SEC.id ORDER BY CODE asc')/ROWS/ROW
